head: ef728e6
phase5_summary: 5-A: RERANK_UPSTREAM_WEIGHT 0.20→0.12 (q10 fixed). 5-B: RERANK_SOURCE_AGREEMENT_BONUS 0.10→0.00 (q05 fixed). Zero regressions.
phase6_summary: 6-A through 6-D complete. 60-query combined run exists with metrics and error reports.
phase7_summary: Mood analysis found 40% mood miss rate vs 8% non-mood miss rate and produced Phase 8 plan.
phase8_summary: 8-A through 8-F implemented/validated. 8-G fresh 65-query eval completed, but no-mood hit-to-miss flips and q49/q59 hybrid mood regressions require Claude investigation.

codex.last_result: NEEDS_REVIEW: non-mood hit-to-miss flips and q49/q59 hybrid regressions
